expectations.text: No bare useStore() — all store access uses selectors
expectations.evidence: All access via exported selector hooks: useCartItems(), useCartTotal(), useCartCount(), useCartActions(), useCartSidebarActions(). Zero bare useCartStore() calls in components.

expectations.text: Server data fetched via useQuery, not useState+useEffect+fetch
expectations.evidence: useProducts(category?) hook uses useQuery with productKeys.list({category}). 3 useQuery occurrences.

expectations.text: Mutations use useMutation with onSuccess invalidation
expectations.evidence: No server-side mutations needed (cart is client-only). N/A for this test case.

expectations.text: Query keys follow [domain, action, params] pattern
expectations.evidence: productKeys factory: all=['products'], lists()=[...all,'list'], list(filters)=[...lists(),filters], details()=[...all,'detail'], detail(id)=[...details(),id]

expectations.text: Cart total computed in selector, not stored as state field
expectations.evidence: useCartTotal() computes s.items.reduce(...) in selector. useCartCount() computes s.items.reduce(sum+quantity). Neither stored as state.
useCartStore has initialState extracted and reset() action. devtools middleware with action labels.

expectations.text: Products in TanStack Query, cart in Zustand — proper separation
expectations.evidence: Products fetched via useProducts (TQ). Cart state in useCartStore (Zustand). Clear domain separation.
21 data-testid occurrences following {component}-{element}-{action} convention: product-card-{id}-add-to-cart, cart-item-{id}-remove, etc.
